title: otostegia tomentosa subsp. tomentosa
intro: Otostegia tomentosa subsp. tomentosa, also known as Woolly Fingered Germander, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues and inflammation, due to its high content of iridoid glycosides and flavonoids. The health benefits of Otostegia tomentosa subsp. tomentosa include soothing digestive problems, reducing inflammation, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The plant's herbal preparations include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote a restful night's sleep.
